results.title: Coterra AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Coterra Energy has positioned itself as an early adopter of AI-powered automation in oil and gas operations. The company made headlines in January 2025 when it became the first operator to deploy fully automated hydraulic fracturing technology with Halliburton's Octiv Auto Frac service, achieving a 17% increase in stage efficiency[1]. Beyond fracturing automation, Coterra has integrated AI and machine learning into subsurface operations focused on wells and completions, resulting in nearly 20% productivity gains per foot[2]. The company's approach treats AI not as an "ivory tower" technology but as a service woven into daily operations to help employees perform more effectively[2].

What AI technologies is Coterra Energy using in its operations?
...
Coterra uses automated fracturing technology through Halliburton's Octiv Auto Frac service and AI/ML for subsurface wells and completions optimization, achieving 17% efficiency gains and 20% productivity improvements.
...
Coterra was the first operator to deploy fully automated hydraulic fracturing in North America and treats AI as integrated into daily operations rather than experimental technology, focusing on practical business impact.
...
AI implementation has delivered measurable results including 17% increase in fracturing stage efficiency and nearly 20% improvement in productivity per foot in subsurface operations.
...
Is Coterra investing in AI workforce development?
...
Yes, Coterra uses VR technology for recruiting, training, and upskilling future energy professionals and emphasizes that AI is designed to help people perform jobs more effectively, not replace them.
...
What are Coterra's future AI plans?
...
The company continues to focus on maximizing efficiencies and exploring new opportunities through advanced technologies, with AI woven into everything they do as a technically driven, data-focused organization.

results.title: Austin Bailey
highlights:
Platform & Infrastructure
...
GenAI, Kubernetes, AI
...
GenAI Lead at [Coterra Energy](https://www.linkedin.com/company/coterra-energy)
...
At Coterra, I lead GenAI platform development across architecture, infrastructure, governance, and delivery. My work has included designing and scaling an internal AI platform with centralized LLM access, secure cloud infrastructure, custom tools and agents, hybrid SQL + RAG capabilities, and integration patterns for existing business applications. The platform is now deployed broadly across the company and has grown into a meaningful internal product rather than a technical experiment. I operate at the intersection of enterprise architecture, AI infrastructure, developer systems, and applied business value. My focus is building durable technical capability: systems, patterns, and platforms that scale with organizational demand. I came into this work through geophysics and data science, and over time expanded into ML engineering, cloud architecture, infrastructure, and technical leadership. I am particularly interested in enterprise AI platforms, modern internal developer ecosystems, and the future of AI in industrial and energy environments.
...
#### GenAI Lead (Current)
...
- Lead the architecture and rollout of Coterra’s internal enterprise GenAI platform "Terra AI", spanning end-user AI experiences, centralized model governance, custom tools and agents, and production cloud infrastructure.
...
and scaled the platform from early design into broad internal deployment, supporting 450+ users and 100+ daily active users while advancing platform stability, security, governance, and operational readiness.
...
- Established centralized LLM governance and access patterns through LiteLLM, enabling model routing, usage tracking, rate limiting, and platform-wide control.
...
- Helped define hybrid SQL + RAG architecture for business-facing AI applications, enabling natural-language access to operational and engineering information.
...
- Established scalable integration patterns for embedding AI capabilities into existing internal applications.
...
#### Senior Data Scientist
...
- Founding member of Coterra’s ML team, helping grow it from an early internal initiative into a critical business capability.
...
- Worked across machine learning, software development, DevOps, and cloud architecture to support scalable production systems.
...
- Developed machine learning solutions for production forecasting and large-scale subsurface and operational workflows.
...
- Designed and supported cloud infrastructure patterns that improved reliability and scalability for internal products.
...
- Partnered with business stakeholders and technical teams to translate technical capabilities into usable internal tools.
...
#### Data Scientist
...
Founding member of the ML team at Coterra, helping the team grow its product to become the most critical decision-making tool at the company. Served roles across many disciplines depending on the needs of the team: developer, ML engineer, DevOps engineer, cloud architect, or geoscientist.

highlights:

Senior Data Engineer with 9+ years leading data platform design in the energy sector. Specialized in cost-optimized architectures that reduce data movement (~1 TB/day) via data virtualization, query federation, and CDC pipelines. Delivered low-latency, billion-row analytics systems while driving material compute, storage, and egress cost reductions across complex, multi-source environments. Deep experience across financial, accounting, and engineering domains.

“It’s
...
mentor like Phil.
...
crucial role in the oil and gas industry.
...
Phil always approached our conversations with genuine interest, empathy, and willingness to help me understand. He answered my vast array of questions with eagerness no matter how many I had, and always did so with thoughtfulness and diligence. Our conversations ranged from book recommendations, to how Carlsbad Caverns in New Mexico was formed, to how we assess our asset portfolio from a science perspective, and insights gained from our career journeys. One of the standout moments in our mentorship was our conversation related to how the Data and Generative AI projects I support impact his area of expertise in our business. We discussed our excitement and considerations around the use of AI and Machine Learning and its potential applications and impacts on our business and ways of working.
...
Phil is an exceptional mentor and a true asset to Marathon Oil and any team. His expertise, combined with his passion for his trade and compassionate and friendly demeanor, makes him a memorable individual and valued mentor.”

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Support database design and optimization, including writing efficient queries for large-scale data processing and retrieval.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.
...

I'm super excited to announce a new feature that's part of Cotera's AI suite: running AI models at scale on top of any data that you have. 

This has a ton of use cases - do you want to clean dirty phone number data in google sheets? 

Auto-tag customer complaints in your customer service instance? 

Write perfect cold outbound emails? 

We can sit on top of any data source, and as new data comes in, automatically run the model on top of it.
...
If you saw my post yesterday, you know we're focused on tool safety and cost for workflows. In that vein, I'm REALLY excited to announce our latest Cotera launch: Subagents!
...
You can now chain multiple Cotera agents in a single workflow. 

Each subagent runs its own LLM with its own tools - the benefit here is that you can use the right AI models (and not just the expensive ones) for each part of the workflow.
...
What you can do with it:
...
🎯 Specialize per step. ChatGPT for nuanced research, Gemini for creative, Mistral for quick classification. The right AI for each job.
...
💰 Cut cost without cutting accuracy. In our tests, a GPT-5 mini subagent chain matched GPT-5.5 on accuracy at roughly 16x lower cost.
...

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

results.title: Senior Machine Learning Scientist, Agentic AI at Natera - United States Remote
highlights:
Senior Machine Learning Scientist, Agentic AI at Natera - United States Remote
...
# Senior Machine Learning Scientist, Agentic AI
...
🇺🇸 United States – Remote
...
🤖 Machine Learning Engineer
...
Natera is a global leader in cell-free DNA testing technology, specializing in non-invasive genetic testing and diagnostics. The company's innovative solutions focus on areas such as prenatal screening, cancer detection, and organ transplant monitoring.
...
using advanced bioinformatics and DNA analysis, Natera provides healthcare professionals and patients with critical information to make more informed medical decisions.
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Lead the technical design and deployment of multi-agent systems capable of autonomous hypothesis generation and tool use, including genomic variant calling, LLM fine-tuning, and clinical trial matching pipelines • Incorporate and advance Natera’s transformer-based foundation model by integrating DNA, RNA, and H&E imaging modalities for multi-step biological reasoning and tool use • Implement advanced LLM reasoning frameworks, such as ReAct and Chain-of-Thought, alongside reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) to ensure agents provide accurate, explainable clinical rationales • Architect systems that autonomously translate complex, multi-modal data into diagnostic and therapeutic insights with human-verifiable reasoning and tracing • Own the technical strategy and product roadmap for agentic workflows across the Biopharma Solutions and Therapeutics Discovery division, converting complex clinical challenges into scalable AI systems • Establish production-grade machine learning engineering standards and reproducible architectures across the AI team to ensure absolute model transparency and scientific auditability • Drive cross-functional alignment and technical consensus by defending agentic architectures and biological reasoning frameworks in rigorous peer reviews
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• PhD or Master's degree in Computer Science, Bioinformatics, Statistics, or a related quantitative field • 8 or more years of experience in AI research or engineering, with a proven track record of moving multi-agent orchestration architectures or large-scale language model workflows from prototype to production • Deep experience with agentic frameworks, such as LangChain or Claude Agent SDK, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and validation frameworks for autonomous AI agents • Strong understanding of cancer genomics (WES/WTS), mutational signatures, and structure-activity relationships • Advanced production-level development experience using PyTorch and experience with distributed training on large GPU clusters, including NVIDIA H100s.

results.title: Senior–Staff Machine Learning Researcher | Joblume
highlights:
Senior–Staff Machine Learning Researcher | Joblume
...
# Senior–Staff Machine Learning Researcher
...
Remote, USA
...
Posted Jun 30, 2026
...
Full-time
...
## About Terra AI We are building the state-of-the-art AI platform for the discovery and development of clean energy and mineral resources. We bring the most advanced techniques in generative AI, foundation modeling, and autonomous decision optimization to tackle the most important problems in the geosciences. These systems can help more reliably identify critical resource deposits, more rapidly measure and characterize them, and design more efficient and sustainable production plans. We are backed by Khosla Ventures and other leading venture investors. We are now looking to grow our team from ~15 to ~30 by the end of the year to continue to mature our technology and support deployment with our world-class mineral and clean energy partners. Role description In the same way image generators have shown the remarkable ability to produce a diverse set of realistic pictures conditioned on a text prompt (and other inputs), we are developing a generative model that produces 3D geological models conditioned on geophysical surveys, bore hole measurements, and other forms of physical observation. The outputs of the generative model capture what we know and don’t know about the state of the subsurface, allowing explorers to make maximally informed decisions about how and where to explore for critical resources. We are looking for a talented deep learning engineer or scientist to lead the development of this model that will revolutionize decision making in the earth subsurface for a wide range of clean energy applications. Role Responsibilities Design, train, test, and iterate on diffusion models for 3D geological models Design, train, test, and iterate on an approach to for conditioning generation on geophysical data and other observations Inform the generation of synthetic data to improve model performance Adapt diffusion modeling approach to specific real-world projects in collaboration with project teams. Qualifications Required Qualifications: Extensive PyTorch Experience Deep understanding of PyTorch, including writing custom modules, optimizing training, and debugging issues in large-scale models. Expertise in Developing Large Deep Learning Models from Scratch Proven ability to design, implement, and train complex deep learning architectures from the ground up. Data Curation Skills Hands-on experience in creating, cleaning, and maintaining high-quality datasets tailored for machine learning applications. Strong Software Engineering and Design Experience Proficient in software development best practices, including version control, testing, and code optimization. Familiarity with designing scalable and maintainable systems. Bonus points if you: Experience with Generative Models Familiarity with generative architectures, particularly diffusion models, and an emphasis on posterior sampling methods. Knowledge of Transformer Architectures Experience building and training transformers, especially in applications involving 3D data. Scaling Models Across Large GPU Clusters Expertise in parallelizing models across multiple GPUs and optimizing distributed training pipelines. Cloud Infrastructure Expertise Experience setting up, managing, and optimizing cloud environments for machine learning workloads, including provisioning resources and managing costs.

results.title: Generative Artificial Intelligence Architect (Remote) | Jobflarely
highlights:
Generative Artificial Intelligence Architect (Remote) | Jobflarely
...
# Generative Artificial Intelligence Architect (Remote)
...
, 2026
...
- AI System Architecture: Design and develop the architecture and infrastructure for AI systems, including data storage, processing, and retrieval mechanisms. Ensure scalability, flexibility, and efficiency of the system to handle large volumes of data and complex algorithms.
...
- Algorithm Development: Develop and implement advanced AI algorithms and models, including machine learning, deep learning, and neural networks. Continuously evaluate and improve algorithms to enhance system performance and accuracy.
...
- Data Integration: Identify relevant data sources and design methods for data collection, integration, cleansing, and transformation. Collaborate with data scientists and engineers to ensure quality and relevance of data for AI model training.
...
- Model Training and Evaluation: Train AI models using supervised, unsupervised, or reinforcement learning techniques. Implement evaluation methodologies to measure the performance and effectiveness of trained models. Fine-tune models based on feedback and data insights.
...
- Neural Network Design: Design and optimize deep learning neural networks for various AI tasks, such as natural language processing, computer vision, recommendation systems, and predictive analytics. Implement innovative architectures and techniques to improve model accuracy and efficiency.
...
- System Integration: Collaborate with software developers and engineers to integrate AI systems into existing platforms or applications. Ensure seamless communication and compatibility between AI components and other software modules.
...
- Ethical and Responsible AI: Ensure alignment to ethical AI practices, such as fairness, transparency, and accountability. Address biases and potential risks associated with AI systems to ensure responsible deployment and usage.
...
- Research and Innovation: Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI technologies, frameworks, and algorithms. Conduct research and experimentation to explore new approaches and techniques that can enhance AI capabilities.
...
- Collaboration and Communication: Collaborate with multi-functional teams, including data scientists, software engineers, and business partners, to define AI requirements and deliver AI solutions that meet business objectives. Communicate complex AI concepts and solutions effectively to both technical and non-technical team members.
...
- Qualifications:
...
- A Bachelor's or equivalent experience or Master's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or related field.
- Proven experience in designing and developing AI systems, including machine learning, deep learning, and neural networks.
...
- Strong programming skills in languages such as Python, R, or Java. Familiarity with AI libraries, frameworks, and tools such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Keras.
...
- Solid understanding of cloud computing platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and experience deploying AI models on these platforms.
...
- Comprehension of AI concepts, algorithms, and methodologies.
...
- Knowledge of designing large scale AI solutions, data integration, cleansing, and transformation techniques.
...
- Familiarity with BigData platforms and technologies, such as Hadoop or Spark.
...
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to think creatively and provide innovative solutions.
...
- Strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively in multidisciplinary teams.
...
- Knowledge of ethical AI practices and regulations is a plus.
...
Employee Status : Full Time Employee
...
### Shift : Day Job
...
Job Posting : Feb 06 2024
